name: Personal Browser Home
description: A personal browser new tab dashboard built with Next.js.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://stooq.com https://api.open-meteo.com https://geocoding-api.open-meteo.com https://air-quality-api.open-meteo.com https://v1.hitokoto.cn; img-src 'self' https: data:;
